title: Vishwamitra Ashram, Bisaul
tagline: Vishwamitra Ashram, Bisaul — heritage city of Bihar

overview.short: Vishwamitra Ashram at Bisaul village of Madhubani district in the Mithila region of Bihar was the residence place related to the Vedic sage Vishwamitra in Ramayana.
overview.description: Vishwamitra Ashram at Bisaul village of Madhubani district in the Mithila region of Bihar was the residence place related to the Vedic sage Vishwamitra in Ramayana. It is located near the capital city Janakpur of ancient Mithila Kingdom.

topPlaces.name: Kalyaneshwar Mahadev Mandir
topPlaces.description: Kalyaneshwar Mahadev Mandir (Maithili: कल्याणेश्वर महादेव मंदिर) was established by King Janaka in Mithila. The temple is also the part of Mithila Madhya Parikrama circuit.

topPlaces.name: Itaharwa
topPlaces.description: Itaharwa is a village development committee in Dhanusa District in the Janakpur Zone of south-eastern Nepal. At the time of the 1991 Nepal census it had a population of 3,362 persons living in 562 individual households.

topPlaces.name: Dhanauji Rural Municipality
topPlaces.description: Dhanauji is a rural municipality in Dhanusha District in Province No. 2 of south-eastern Nepal established in 2073.

topPlaces.name: Lagmagadha Guthi
topPlaces.description: Lagmamdha Guthi, often shortened to 'Lagma', is a Village Development Committee (VDC) in Dhanusa District in the Janakpur Zone of south-eastern Nepal. At the time of the 1991 Nepal census, it had a population of 3,726 people living in 663 individual households.

topPlaces.name: Janaknandini Rural Municipality
topPlaces.description: Janaknandani (Nepali: जनकनन्दिनी) is a rural municipality in Danusha District in Province No. 2 of Nepal.

topPlaces.name: Debadiha
topPlaces.description: Debadiha is a village development committee in Dhanusa District in the Janakpur Zone of south-eastern Nepal. At the time of the 1991 Nepal census it had a population of 5,341 persons living in 829 individual households.

topPlaces.name: Lakhauri
topPlaces.description: Lakhauri is a rural municipality in Dhanusa District in the Janakpur Zone of south-eastern Nepal. At the time of the 1991 Nepal census, it had 2,882 people living in 505 households.

topPlaces.name: Jhojhi Kataiya
topPlaces.description: Jhojhi Kataiya is a village development committee in Dhanusa District in the Janakpur Zone of south-eastern Nepal. At the time of the 1991 Nepal census it had a population of 3,169 persons living in 513 individual households.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Vishwamitra Ashram, Bisaul?
faq.a: The best time to visit Vishwamitra Ashram, Bisaul is Oct – Mar. Summers are 25–42°C and winters are 7–24°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Vishwamitra Ashram, Bisaul?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Jay Prakash Narayan Airport, Patna (146 km) and the nearest railway station is Muzaffarpur Junction (82 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Vishwamitra Ashram, Bisaul?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Vishwamitra Ashram, Bisaul at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Vishwamitra Ashram, Bisaul?
faq.a: Stays in Vishwamitra Ashram, Bisaul start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Vishwamitra Ashram, Bisaul?
faq.a: The top attractions are Kalyaneshwar Mahadev Mandir, Itaharwa, Dhanauji Rural Municipality, Lagmagadha Guthi, Janaknandini Rural Municipality.
